text: Holmqvist offers a unique analysis of the relationship between war and policing in the 21st century. Based on empirical material from research in the security sector this interdisciplinary study of contemporary Western strategic thinking reveals how, when and why the logics of war and of policing are combined, and what the consequences of such combinations are.
